title: [CI:DOCS] point IRC to libera.chat
body:
Project IRC comms are moving to Libera. Update docs.

Confirmation cookie: libera-ieVeeGahbiaf1einguw1xav6bahquie

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Cookie as requested by Libera.Chat ticket number 421, channel registration.
@containers/podman-maintainers in case anyone is around this weekend: merging this will grant us ownership of the `#podman` namespace on libera.chat
I think podman.io also needs to be updated.
